query:
SELECT o.name, o.ecoCode,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzles p WHERE p.openingName = o.name) as directMatch,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzles p WHERE p.openingName LIKE CONCAT(o.name, '%')) as likeMatch
FROM openings o
WHERE o.name LIKE '%Sicilian%' OR o.name LIKE '%Queen%Gambit%'
ORDER BY directMatch DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzles p WHERE p.openingName LIKE CONCAT(o.name, '%')) as likeMatch

WHERE o.name LIKE '%Sicilian%' OR o.name LIKE '%Queen%Gambit%'
